case_title: CAROL LAVELLE VS. JUAN MENA et al

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-12-2005. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-17-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JUL-08-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF REJECTION OF PROPOSED ARBITRATOR (DENNIS CLARK BIRKHIMER) FILED BY DEFENDANT JUAN MENA

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAVELLE, CAROL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENA, JUAN $27,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $27,500.00, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAVELLE, CAROL AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, JUAN
